title: My University in 2025: Writing Competition 2014-2015
description: The data consist of My University in 2025: Writing Competition 2014-2015 texts. The target group for the writing competition was students, personnel, and alumni of University of Tampere. The texts varied in style and length; some were fictional, while others contained concrete development ideas. Most of the archived texts were written in Finnish. Two texts were written in English and one text contained both Finnish and English. The data do not contain background information about the writers. Th
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
